trends.summary: Alex Saab fell out of favor with the new administration that took power since Maduro’s ouster and capture by US forces in January.

trends.headline: Trump blasts ‘disloyal’ Sen. Cassidy while pushing challenger in Louisiana Republican primary
trends.summary: Sen. Bill Cassidy faces a Trump-backed primary challenge in Louisiana as the president targets Republicans he considers insufficiently loyal.

trends.headline: North America’s largest commuter rail system shuts down as workers strike
trends.summary: A strike by union workers brought North America’s largest commuter rail network to a halt Saturday, disrupting transit across the New York City region.

trends.headline: Scientists find climate change is reducing oxygen in rivers worldwide
trends.summary: A new study finds climate change is steadily draining oxygen from rivers around the world, raising concerns for fish and other aquatic life.

trends.headline: Argentina’s beef consumption falls to lowest level in 20 years as prices soar
trends.summary: As beef prices climb across Argentina, longtime butchers in Buenos Aires are watching consumption fall to levels not seen in two decades.
